item.title: Inside Charles Manson's Crazed 'Family'
item.description: An overview of Charles Manson and the Manson Family, covering the crimes, investigation, and their lasting impact on criminal history and culture.

media:content.media:title: Inside Charles Manson's Crazed 'Family'
media:content.media:description: An overview of Charles Manson and the Manson Family, covering the crimes, investigation, and their lasting impact on criminal history and culture.

item.title: John Darwin: Faked Death Case
item.description: The man who FAKED his own DEATH... and nearly got away with it

media:content.media:title: John Darwin: Faked Death Case
media:content.media:description: The man who FAKED his own DEATH... and nearly got away with it

item.title: What Happened to the Lead Mask Men?
item.description: An overview of the mysterious Lead Mask case in Brazil, exploring the discovery, investigation, and the unanswered questions that continue to surround it.

media:content.media:title: What Happened to the Lead Mask Men?
media:content.media:description: An overview of the mysterious Lead Mask case in Brazil, exploring the discovery, investigation, and the unanswered questions that continue to surround it.

item.title: House Fire Mystery: Where Are Gage & Chloie?
item.description: After a house fire, Gage Daniel and Chloie Leverette were reported missing, with no remains found. This overview explores the investigation and the unanswered questions.

media:content.media:title: House Fire Mystery: Where Are Gage & Chloie?
media:content.media:description: After a house fire, Gage Daniel and Chloie Leverette were reported missing, with no remains found. This overview explores the investigation and the unanswered questions.

item.title: A Brother’s Shadow Held A Darker Secret
item.description: A factual overview of the Cary Stayner case, covering the investigation, arrests, and the impact of the crimes in the Yosemite area.

media:content.media:title: A Brother’s Shadow Held A Darker Secret
media:content.media:description: A factual overview of the Cary Stayner case, covering the investigation, arrests, and the impact of the crimes in the Yosemite area.
